text:
Mr. Springer was the father of Connie Springer and a resident in Ragako village. He was transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan during Wall Rose's supposed breach.

Appearance

Human form

Mr. Springer was a fairly tall, middle-aged man with a small, clean beard, short black hair and a mustache. He was portrayed wearing a formal outfit with a tie.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

Mr. Springer is one of the victims gassed by Marleyan soldiers before being turned into a Titan by Zeke Yeager at the start of Wall Rose's Titan invasion.

Mr. Springer's Titan is eventually killed by the Survey Corps at some point during the week before Wall Rose was declared Titan-free.

Trivia

He shares a birthday with Gunther Schultz and Reiner's father.
